prompt: Photorealistic luxury stationery photography. An A4 letterhead on premium cream (#F5F0EB) paper stock, laying on a dark walnut desk surface, shot from overhead. At the top of the letterhead is a logo mark — a dark charcoal (#2C2C2C) pentagon shape formed by taking a rectangle and slicing off only the top-right corner at a 45-degree diagonal, creating a five-sided shape (flat bottom, flat left side, flat top until three-quarters across, then a diagonal cut down to the right side, flat right side). The letters LK are rendered in gold (#C9A96E) within the pentagon shape, in an elegant serif font, appearing carved/inset. A thin gold line along the bottom inside the shape. Below the mark reads DESIGN AND BUILD in refined small charcoal capitals with generous letter-spacing. The pentagon shape serves as a bold geometric header device on the cream paper. A gold pen and dark leather desk accessories nearby. Shot on 50mm lens, soft natural light from window, cinematic, premium construction company branding, Adelaide.
negative_prompt: hexagon, diamond, circle, octagon, symmetrical shape, cheap, cartoon, blurry, distorted text, misspelled, bright neon, cluttered, plastic, low quality, amateur, watermark, stock photo, illustration, 3D render, wrinkled paper
